name: @metalabel/dfos-explorer
description: DFOS Explorer — a client-side-only chain explorer over untrusted relays. Renders relay claims instantly, then re-verifies everything in the tab via @metalabel/dfos-client; syncs the full operation log into a local IndexedDB index that folds offline.
author: Metalabel <hello@metalabel.com> (https://metalabel.com)
